items.name_en: In stock 25c HOBO Bag. A hit this season that caught my eye at first glance. Adjustable chain transforms into a bucket bag. Medium size, very practical. Two small pockets on the front for travel, perfect for phone and passport. Large capacity, looks cool when worn! Dimensions: 30*26*14*cm

items.name_en: In Stock 25C, The King of Bags, HOBO Denim Medium. This bag is surprisingly light and beautiful in person. Added four pockets 👝, giving the bag a lot of energy. The chain is chunky, but the bag feels light on the body. It's the kind of bag you just grab and go 😎. The body is lambskin, hardware is vintage, looks super textured!!! Huge capacity, fits large phones, sunglasses 🕶️, etc... It's not small at all. Highly recommended for daily use or posing for photos.

items.name_en: In stock 25k Hobo Bag
items.name_cn:
In stock 25k Hobo Bag
Full of high-end vibes! Redefining the perfect balance of casual and luxury with its unique lazy silhouette and exquisite craftsmanship. Eclectic elegance~ Calfskin is soft and delicate; incredibly soft to the touch~
Open drawstring paired with double C buckle and 25bag design!!️ Very eye-catching, the perfect companion from casual to elegant ✨29*18*12*cm99522

items.name_en: In Stock 25P mini Panda🐼 color backpack
items.name_cn:
In Stock 25P mini Panda🐼 color backpack
The palm-sized mini backpack is right up my alley. Made of lambskin with a quilted design and a small front pocket, it has no unnecessary details. Don't let the size fool you; it can actually hold a phone, lipstick, compact powder, tissues, and other small items. More importantly, it offers multiple carrying styles: backpack, shoulder bag, crossbody, handbag, etc. You can carry it however you like.
Size: 22*18*10cm 99473

items.name_en: In Stock 25s hobo, I really love it, one bag three uses
items.name_cn:
In Stock 25s hobo, I really love it, one bag three uses
Medium size with a very lazy vibe! Pull the strap tight to instantly turn it into a backpack 🎒. Loosen the strap to turn it into a single-shoulder hobo. The flexible strap design is amazing. The front of the bag features a simple and elegant large quilted pattern. Dual metal chains on both sides with double-C adjustable buckles. Calfskin is soft, delicate, practical, and easy to maintain! The strap is adjustable for DIY carrying styles: underarm hobo, backpack, shoulder bag, handbag, etc....
Size: 20*31*8.5cm 99471

items.name_en: In Stock Chane🌱Vintage Backpack
items.name_cn:
In Stock Chane🌱Vintage Backpack
To be honest, this is a vintage backpack that can be passed down for generations!Classic double C logo, quilted pattern paired with gold metal, leather chain strap, full of texture. The lambskin is soft and delicate, you can't help but want to own and cherish it!It can be used in all four seasons and suits any style💃It must be in your handbag collection
Dimensions 21 10 20.5cm
Number A2210 Large
Lambskin Caramel Brown
